title: thelypteris borealis
intro: Thelypteris borealis, also known as the northern lady fern, is a perennial fern species native to the northern hemisphere, particularly found in North America and Eurasia. The medicinal properties of Thelypteris borealis lie in its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat wounds, burns, and skin conditions. The health benefits of consuming Thelypteris borealis are still being researched, but it is believed to have antioxidant and anti-cancer properties, as well as the ability to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Thelypteris borealis can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation.
